MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi; Clerk Nicole Davis; Reporter Susan Lee. (218/206)

Appearances:
Atty. Joseph Sacramento appearing for plaintiff Ed Litke
Defendant Shanna May Ucan is present.
Limited Scope Atty. Dolores Chong is present with defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Settlement conference held, case settled. Terms of settlement fully recited on the record. Judge Pro Tem voir dires parties as to the settlement agreement. Plaintiff's counsel to file stipulation with the court. Trial date vacated.
